title: Janez Brest
text: Home * People * Janez Brest Janez Brest [1] Janez Brest , a Slovenian computer scientist and full professor at Computer Architecture and Languages Laboratory [2] , Institute of Computer Science at University of Maribor . His research interests include case-based reasoning , multi-objective optimization , and evolutionary computation , in particular differential evolution applied to protein folding optimization, also used in automated tuning of chess engines.
